titleStmt.title: SII 5.991: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 991. (A.R. No. 126 of 1896). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF KODANDARAMA SHRINE AT MADURANTAHAM, MADURANTAHAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . śrīparān=tade vaṟku yāṇṭu Ēḻāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūṟ koṭṭattut taniyūr śrīmadhu rān=ta kaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu tiru vayottip perumāḷukku Ittevar tiruuṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭaruḷik kal
lilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatāka nammūr teṉpiṭākai virapoki melpāṟ kellai ceṅkāṭṭūr kiḻaiccēri Ellaikkum ciṉṟipākkattu Ellaikku kiḻakkum teṉpāṟ kellai Ellaikkuḻikkum ceyyūr Ellaikkum vaṭak
ku kiḻpāṟ kellai mukkūṭṭaṉkallukkum pākkūr pukappāyvatāṉa vāykkālukku meṟkum vaṭapāṟ kellai perumpākkattil teṟkil kallampāṟaikkut teṟkum Itukku Uṭpaṭṭa nīrnilamum kollainilamum kuṭiyiruppu Uṭpaṭṭa
nattamum Ittevar tirumukam piracātappaṭṭu Ittirumukappaṭiye tiruuṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭuk kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom śrīmadhu rān=ta kaccaturvvedi maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhai yom paṇiyāl maturāntakamuṭaiyān tanmappiri
yaṉ vaittamāneti Eḻuttu paṇiyāl Ivūr taiccakkāṇiuṭaiya paṭṭaṉāna ṉālāyira Ācāriyan EḻuttuThe characters in which the inscription is engraved appear to be of a later date than that of Parā0ntka....
Digital edition of SII 5.991 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
